name: Garlic-Herb Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the biscuit mix with cold water and grated Cheddar cheese.
2. Drop by large spoonfuls onto a greased baking sheet.
3. Bake at 450 degrees for 8 to 10 minutes.
4. Mix melted margarine with seasonings.
5. Brush on biscuits while hot.
6. Serve warm. Makes a dozen.
